message.content: Give me a quick overview of the project structure. List the top-level files and the src/ directory tree. Run `ls -la` at the root and `find src -type f | sort` to show all source files.

content.text: I'll get you an overview of the project structure.

content.text:
## Project Structure Overview

**Top-level files:**
- `loop.ts` - Ralph loop implementation for iterative Claude Code work
- `package.json` - Project dependencies and scripts
- `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration
- `vite.config.ts` - Vite build configuration
- `eslint.config.js` - ESLint configuration
- `prettier.config.mjs` - Prettier formatting configuration
- `index.html` - Entry HTML file
- `CLAUDE.md` - Project instructions
- `README.md` - Project documentation
- `.npmrc` - NPM configuration
- `bun.lock` - Bun lock file

**Source directory tree (`src/`):**

```
src/
├── App.tsx                                    # Main app component
├── main.tsx                                   # Entry point
├── test_setup.ts                              # Test configuration
├── types.ts                                   # TypeScript type definitions
├── vite-env.d.ts                              # Vite environment types
├── styles/
│   ├── _tokens.scss                           # Design tokens (colors, spacing, etc.)
│   └── global.scss                            # Global styles
├── data/
│   └── mock_data.ts                           # Mock data for development
├── components/
│   ├── action_panel/
│   │   ├── action_panel.tsx
│   │   ├── action_panel.scss
│   │   ├── actions_dropdown.tsx
│   │   └── actions_dropdown.scss
│   ├── command_palette/
│   │   ├── command_palette.tsx
│   │   └── command_palette.scss
│   ├── detail/
│   │   ├── detail.tsx
│   │   ├── detail.scss
│   │   ├── detail_metadata.tsx
│   │   └── index.ts
│   ├── empty_state/
│   │   ├── empty_state.tsx
│   │   └── empty_state.scss
│   ├── icons/
│   │   └── icons.tsx                          # SVG icon components
│   ├── kbd/
│   │   ├── kbd.tsx
│   │   └── kbd.scss
│   ├── list/
│   │   ├── list.tsx
│   │   ├── list.scss
│   │   ├── list_context.tsx
│   │   ├── list_item/
│   │   │   ├── list_item.tsx
│   │   │   └── list_item.scss
│   │   ├── list_section/
│   │   │   ├── list_section.tsx
│   │   │   └── list_section.scss
│   │   └── index.ts
│   ├── search_bar/
│   │   ├── search_bar.tsx
│   │   └── search_bar.scss
```

**Key characteristics:**
- **Framework**: React 19 with TypeScript (strict mode)
- **Build tool**: Vite 6
- **Package manager**: Bun
- **Styling**: Sass (no CSS modules or Tailwind)
- **Purpose**: Raycast UI clone - pixel-perfect reproduction of the Raycast interface
